data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for walk-away tolerance with position hold.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific requirement for 'walk-away tolerance (bathroom, shopping) with position hold'. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but without direct evidence demonstrating its implementation, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of walk-away tolerance with position hold.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the walk-away tolerance requirement.
